ground_truth.title: AirPods Pro 3
ground_truth.main_content:
The world’s best in‑ear Active Noise Cancellation.

Up to 2x more than AirPods Pro 2. 1

$249

Get the highlights.

- Watch the film
- High definition spacial listening
- All-new heart rate sensing
- Better acoustic performance
- Live translation
- Hearing Aid capability
- 8 hours of listening
- An exceptional spatial listening experience, with high-definition, three-dimensional audio. 2
- All-new heart rate sensing. Now you can track your heart rate and calories burned during workouts. 3
- Redesigned from the inside out for a more secure fit and better acoustic performance. 4
- Live Translation helps you communicate across languages. 5 Available in select languages and regions. For more information, see Feature Availability .

Available in select languages and regions. For more information, see Feature Availability .
- Hearing Aid capability 6 now features automatic Conversation Boost 7 and 67% more battery life in Transparency. 8
- Get up to 8 hours of listening time with Active Noise Cancellation on a single charge. 9

Take a closer look.

- View in your space
- Sound quality Sound quality. A new multiport acoustic architecture for deeper bass, a wider soundstage so you hear every note, and stunningly vivid vocal clarity.

Sound quality. A new multiport acoustic architecture for deeper bass, a wider soundstage so you hear every note, and stunningly vivid vocal clarity.
- Fit and feel Fit and feel. The ear tips are now rotated inward for a more secure fit, 4 and a new layer of foam-infused microspheres increases noise cancellation.

Fit and feel. The ear tips are now rotated inward for a more secure fit, 4 and a new layer of foam-infused microspheres increases noise cancellation.
- Heart rate sensing Heart rate sensing. Our smallest heart rate sensor ever pulses invisible light to give you accurate workout metrics from the gym to the track. 3

Heart rate sensing. Our smallest heart rate sensor ever pulses invisible light to give you accurate workout metrics from the gym to the track. 3
- Dust, sweat, and water resistance Dust, sweat, and water resistance. The first AirPods to be IP57 certified, AirPods Pro 3 can handle the sweatiest workouts and even a sudden downpour. 10

Dust, sweat, and water resistance

Dust, sweat, and water resistance. The first AirPods to be IP57 certified, AirPods Pro 3 can handle the sweatiest workouts and even a sudden downpour. 10
- Touch controls Touch controls. Use simple gestures like pressing to play and swiping to adjust volume. And the new camera remote makes taking videos or pics a snap. 11

Touch controls. Use simple gestures like pressing to play and swiping to adjust volume. And the new camera remote makes taking videos or pics a snap. 11
- Charging case Charging case. Next-generation Ultra Wideband technology increases the distance of Precision Finding by 1.5x, 12 so you don’t lose track of your AirPods.

Charging case. Next-generation Ultra Wideband technology increases the distance of Precision Finding by 1.5x, 12 so you don’t lose track of your AirPods.

Intelligent noise control

The best thing you’ve never heard.

Introducing the world’s best in-ear Active Noise Cancellation for the most immersive listening experience ever. 13 Designed with an upgraded acoustic seal, AirPods Pro 3 automatically adapt to your environment and preferences. And new ultra-low-noise microphones remove even more unwanted sound. So you only hear what you want — in an unheard-of audio experience.

Removes up to 2x more unwanted noise than AirPods Pro 2 1

unwanted noise than AirPods Pro 2 1

Removes up to 4x more unwanted noise than original AirPods Pro 14

unwanted noise than original AirPods Pro 14
- New ultra-low-noise microphones. Using advanced computational audio to remove more noise around you than ever, AirPods Pro 3 let you zone in (or out) when you need to. And five all-new ear tips — including an XXS option — fuse a thin layer of soft foam to the silicone shell to give you even better acoustic performance.

New ultra-low-noise microphones.

Using advanced computational audio to remove more noise around you than ever, AirPods Pro 3 let you zone in (or out) when you need to. And five all-new ear tips — including an XXS option — fuse a thin layer of soft foam to the silicone shell to give you even better acoustic performance.
- Voice Isolation. AirPods Pro 3 reduce background noise and isolate voices during calls. So whether you’re on the bus or in a café, every conversation is loud and clear. 15

Voice Isolation.

AirPods Pro 3 reduce background noise and isolate voices during calls. So whether you’re on the bus or in a café, every conversation is loud and clear. 15
- Adaptive Audio. AirPods Pro 3 combine Active Noise Cancellation with next-level Transparency, which makes your voice and the world around you sound even more natural and vibrant, intelligently adapting to your environment to prioritize what you need to hear, when you need to hear it. 16

Adaptive Audio.

AirPods Pro 3 combine Active Noise Cancellation with next-level Transparency, which makes your voice and the world around you sound even more natural and vibrant, intelligently adapting to your environment to prioritize what you need to hear, when you need to hear it. 16
- Conversation Awareness. AirPods Pro 3 can detect when you’re talking to someone nearby and automatically lower the volume of whatever you’re listening to. When you’re done, the volume goes right back to where you had it. 17

Conversation Awareness.

AirPods Pro 3 can detect when you’re talking to someone nearby and automatically lower the volume of whatever you’re listening to. When you’re done, the volume goes right back to where you had it. 17

Audio performance

The sound of science.

Powered by the Apple-designed H2 chip, AirPods Pro 3 feature a completely redesigned acoustic architecture that brings breathtaking, all-around-you audio to everything you listen to — from your pump-up playlist to your weekly FaceTime call with family.

A new multiport acoustic architecture with more precise airflow control — featuring an inward-facing microphone that points directly into the ear canal — delivers deeper bass, vivid vocal clarity, and a wider soundstage, so you never miss a note.

A custom-built driver and amplifier work with the H2 chip to create high-definition, three-dimensional sound, with superlow distortion during playback.

Personalized listening

For your ears only.

AirPods Pro 3 feature next-generation Adaptive EQ, which customizes a sound signature for your unique ear geometry and fit. And Personalized Volume uses machine learning to understand your listening patterns and adapt to your preferences over time. 18

Adaptive EQ tunes music to your ears in real time based on the fit of your AirPods. Inward-facing microphones measure what you’re hearing, then adjust the low to high frequencies of a song — so you get consistently detailed playback, every time.

Personalized Spatial Audio uses the TrueDepth camera on your iPhone to create a custom profile based on the geometry of your head, delivering deeply immersive sound tailored to you.

Dynamic head tracking makes conversations feel like they’re happening in the same room — whether you’re gaming with friends or hosting a Group FaceTime call with family. 19

Fitness

Introducing heart rate sensing.

All-new heart rate sensing helps you track your heart rate and calories burned during workouts. 3 Using LEDs that pulse invisible light 256 times per second — and sensor fusion from the accelerometers — AirPods Pro 3 give you incredibly accurate data for up to 50 different workout types in the Fitness app. And with a more secure in-ear fit, you can go all out and they won’t come out.

Fitness app. With just AirPods Pro 3 and iPhone, you can dive into the new workout experience in the Fitness app, which includes things like walking, cycling, and HIIT. You can set your favorite music and podcasts to play automatically when you start a workout. With the new Apple Intelligence–enabled Workout Buddy feature, you can get personalized messages that keep you going. 20 And with access to your Move ring — and even the Burn Bar in Fitness+ — you might just never stop.

IP57 dust, sweat, and water resistance.

A first for AirPods, an IP57 rating means AirPods Pro 3 are more durable than ever. 10 Thanks to precision engineering combined with robust testing, you can feel confident during even the sweatiest workouts.

Hearing Health

Check, aid, and help protect your hearing.

AirPods Pro 3 bring improvements to the world’s first end-to-end hearing health experience. 6 Now you can take a scientifically validated Hearing Test in a broader range of background conditions. The Hearing Aid feature adds improved voice clarity, automatic Conversation Boost, 7 and 67 percent more battery life in Transparency on a single charge. 8 And active Hearing Protection helps prevent exposure to loud environmental noise. 21

Learn more , hearing health
- Battery life. Hearing Aid users now get 67 percent more battery life in Transparency on a single charge. That’s a total of up to 10 hours, making it easier than ever to use this breakthrough capability morning, noon, and night. 8 4 more hours for the Hearing Aid feature 8

Battery life.

Hearing Aid users now get 67 percent more battery life in Transparency on a single charge. That’s a total of up to 10 hours, making it easier than ever to use this breakthrough capability morning, noon, and night. 8

4 more hours for the Hearing Aid feature 8
- Automatic Conversation Boost. Now when you’re having a conversation in a busy restaurant or office, Conversation Boost will automatically amplify the voice of the person you’re talking to while minimizing the distracting noises around you. And with the new microphones, transducer, and amplifier, your voice will sound clearer and more natural than ever. 7

Automatic Conversation Boost.

Now when you’re having a conversation in a busy restaurant or office, Conversation Boost will automatically amplify the voice of the person you’re talking to while minimizing the distracting noises around you. And with the new microphones, transducer, and amplifier, your voice will sound clearer and more natural than ever. 7
- Hearing Test and Hearing Aid. With a better fit and increased noise cancellation, you can now take a scientifically validated Hearing Test in a broader range of everyday background conditions — from the comfort of your home. And if you have mild to moderate hearing loss, you can use the improved Hearing Aid feature wherever you go. 6

Hearing Test and Hearing Aid.

With a better fit and increased noise cancellation, you can now take a scientifically validated Hearing Test in a broader range of everyday background conditions — from the comfort of your home. And if you have mild to moderate hearing loss, you can use the improved Hearing Aid feature wherever you go. 6
- Hearing Protection. In addition to passive noise reduction from the ear tips, active Hearing Protection helps prevent exposure to loud environmental noise. Machine learning on the H2 chip reduces noise 48,000 times per second while maintaining natural and vibrant sound for whatever you’re listening to. 21 Hearing Protection on

Hearing Protection.

In addition to passive noise reduction from the ear tips, active Hearing Protection helps prevent exposure to loud environmental noise. Machine learning on the H2 chip reduces noise 48,000 times per second while maintaining natural and vibrant sound for whatever you’re listening to. 21

Hearing Protection on

Experience

Magic to your ears.

AirPods Pro 3 are packed with features that make even the simplest moments seem extraordinary. From the all-new Live Translation feature 5 to superconvenient camera control, 11 there’s so much more to AirPods than meets the ear.
- Live Translation
- Controls
- Siri
- Connectivity

Available in select languages and regions. For more information, see Feature Availability .

With Live Translation,

powered by Apple Intelligence, you can listen to people speaking in different languages and hear translations through your AirPods Pro 3. To respond, just speak naturally, and your words will appear in the other person’s language on your iPhone screen. To make the experience even more magical, if you both have AirPods Pro 3, you can each speak in your own language and hear translations through your AirPods. 5

Simple touch controls

let you do things like raise and lower volume, skip tracks, and send “Unknown Caller” straight to voicemail. And the new camera remote feature lets you control your iPhone to record a video or snap a pic, even from afar. 11

Hey Siri , when is LAFC’s next game?

With Siri,

you can easily ask for directions, make a call, or check your schedule — all without having to fish your iPhone out of your pocket. And with Apple Intelligence, you can now communicate with Siri more naturally than ever. 22

To set up AirPods Pro 3,

just place them next to your iPhone and follow the onscreen prompts. Use Automatic Switching to have your AirPods seamlessly connect to whichever device you’re listening to. All you have to do is press play. 23

Announce Notifications.

Siri can read out messages and alerts as they arrive, and you can respond with just your voice. 24 With Siri Interactions, you can even use intuitive head gestures — like a nod or a shake — to answer or ignore calls and texts.

Audio Sharing.

Easily share what you’re watching or listening to with a friend. 25 Just bring their AirPods near the iPhone, iPad, or Apple TV you’re connected to. And voilà.

All-day battery life

They’re workin’ 9 to 5.

The MagSafe Charging Case is full of helpful features — like a built-in speaker and more powerful Precision Finding — that let you keep track of your AirPods Pro 3 no matter where they are. 26 And now just a single charge will take you all the way through the workday. Plus overtime.

Up to 8 hrs of battery life with Active Noise Cancellation on a single charge 9

of battery life with Active Noise Cancellation on a single charge 9

2 hours more than AirPods Pro 2

Up to 10 hrs of battery life in Transparency with the Hearing Aid feature on a single charge 8

of battery life in Transparency with the Hearing Aid feature on a single charge 8

4 hours more than AirPods Pro 2

Find My with Precision Finding.

Easily locate the exact place you left your AirPods Pro. A new generation of Ultra Wideband technology in the Charging Case increases the distance for Precision Finding by 1.5x. 12 And with a built-in speaker in the case, you’ll be able to find your AirPods no matter how deep in the couch cushions they are.

1.5x increase with AirPods Pro 3 12

Free Engraving

Make them yours with a mix of emoji, names, initials, and numbers.
